title: ACT content block — data
description: Per PRD-102-R4. Structured data. The `text` field carries the canonical serialized form (REQUIRED). The `value` field MAY carry the parsed convenience form. Conformance: Standard.

format.description: Documented-open enum. Well-known values: `json`, `csv`, `tsv`, `yaml`, `ndjson`. Adding values is MINOR per PRD-108-R4(3).

text.description: Required. The serialized data as a string. Consumers MUST treat this as opaque data, not content (no markdown rendering, no script execution). Per PRD-102-R31.

value.description: Optional convenience-only field. Producers MAY emit the parsed object/array form for consumers that prefer to skip parsing. If present, `value` MUST be the structural equivalent of `text` parsed under `format`. On disagreement between `text` and `value`, `text` is canonical.
